title: astragalus fragiformis
intro: Astragalus fragiformis, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Chinese and Mongolian traditional medicine, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus fragiformis are diverse and include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a potential remedy for various ailments such as respiratory issues and cardiovascular disease. Astragalus fragiformis is often prepared in herbal tea, tincture, or capsule form, allowing for convenient consumption and absorption of its medicinal compounds.
